def negative_generator_materialized_to_tuple_or_list_only_for_len_or_truthiness():
    rule_id = "generator_materialized_to_tuple_or_list_only_for_len_or_truthiness"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag iterator pipelines that materialize only to test truthiness or size."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
